title: pelargonium × lycopodioides
intro: Pelargonium × lycopodioides, also known as 'Scented Geranium', is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its fragrant leaves and small white flowers. The plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized in traditional medicine for centuries. The health benefits of Pelargonium × lycopodioides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antiviral properties. The plant's leaves can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its numerous health benefits.
